title: aster × traillii
intro: Aster × traillii, also known as Traill's Aster or Traill's Daisy, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is a cross between Aster alpigenus and Aster umbellatus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aster × traillii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, Aster × traillii is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
